name: @radzor/push-notification
description: Send push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) or Apple Push Notification service (APNs).

inputs.name: credentials
inputs.description: Provider credentials (FCM server key or APNs key/cert)

actions.name: sendToDevice
actions.description: Send push notification to a single device token

actions.name: sendToTopic
actions.description: Send push notification to a topic (FCM only)
